infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: CrewSync uses Bluetooth to connect to your Concept2 PM5 rowing machine monitor.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: CrewSync uses Bluetooth to connect to your Concept2 PM5 rowing machine monitor.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CrewSync uses your camera to analyze your rowing technique.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CrewSync accesses your photo library to upload workout videos for technique analysis.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow CrewSync to access your photos.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Allow CrewSync to connect to your Concept2 PM5 rowing monitor.
